src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Replace the generic @EnableDiscoveryClient with the specific @EnableEurekaClient to align with Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka usage.
Remove the @EnableCircuitBreaker annotation, likely due to a change in how circuit breaking is enabled or configured in the target Spring Cloud version.
Removed imports for classes that are no longer used in the controller after refactoring.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for @Autowired, HttpStatus, CurrencyConversionRepository, and HystrixCommand.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Added import for the new utility class handling data access logic.
Removed the autowired repository field as logic was moved to a static utility class.
Removed the Hystrix command annotation from the addConversionFactor method.
Replaced direct repository save call with a static utility method call.
Replaced verbose ResponseEntity constructor with static factory method for cleaner code.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Changed new ResponseEntity<>(..., HttpStatus.OK) to ResponseEntity.ok(...).

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Replaced direct repository retrieval call with a static utility method call.
Updated the fallback method signature to accept a request body, likely to match the original method's context or requirements.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Added @RequestBody CurrencyConversion currencyConversion parameter to getDataFallBack.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Changed the log level in the fallback method from info to error to better indicate failure.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Changed log.info("In fallback method...") to log.error("In fallback method...").

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Updated the fallback entity creation to use a constructor without the ID field, implying a change in the entity class definition.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Changed new CurrencyConversion(5478,"USA",1.00) to new CurrencyConversion("USA",1.00).

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed JPA annotations (@Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Column) to strip persistence metadata from the class.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for javax.persistence.* and annotations @Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Column.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed validation constraints (@NotEmpty, @NotNull) and their associated imports.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for javax.validation.constraints.NotEmpty and com.sun.istack.NotNull, and removed annotations @NotEmpty and @NotNull.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed the @NonNull annotation from Lombok imports, likely due to removal of fields it was applied to or general cleanup.
Removed the 'id' and 'conversionFactor' fields along with their specific annotations, leaving only 'countryCode'.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed private Integer id; and private Double conversionFactor; declarations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.17 to support Java 17 and modernize the framework stack.
Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
Replace the Spring Cloud BOM version property with a direct dependency management entry for version 2021.0.8 (Ilford) compatible with Spring Boot 2.7.
Remove the deprecated Hystrix circuit breaker starter as it is no longer supported in newer Spring Cloud versions.
Remove the Spring Data JPA starter dependency, likely migrating away from JPA or handling persistence differently.
Remove the explicit javax.persistence dependency which is replaced by jakarta.persistence in newer stacks or removed if JPA is dropped.
Remove the explicit hibernate-core dependency, relying on transitive dependencies or removing JPA support entirely.
Remove the PostgreSQL driver dependency, possibly due to the removal of JPA or a change in database strategy.
Remove the deprecated Spring Cloud Sleuth Zipkin starter as Sleuth is deprecated in favor of Micrometer Tracing.
Remove the deprecated Spring Cloud Sleuth starter as it is no longer maintained in Spring Cloud 2021.x.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter to enable production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Increment the project artifact version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.

Dockerfile.general_idea: The base image remains openjdk:8-jdk-alpine, but comments indicating Java 11 options were removed to simplify the file for the current context.
Updated the JAR filename to match the new version number (0.0.2-SNAPSHOT) and changed the target name inside the container.
Updated the entrypoint command to reference the new JAR filename inside the container.
Explicitly exposed port 8061 for the application.
Removed the ARG definition for the JAR file as it is now hardcoded in the ADD instruction.
Removed the WORKDIR instruction, relying on the default working directory or the ADD destination.
Removed outdated comments and instructions related to Java 11 and old docker run commands.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed comments about Java 11 and sudo docker run examples
